invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破3150（基于ATR 16.9981和近期支撑调整，原为3120）或融资费率Z-Score超过100%（显示进一步拥挤），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 3150 (adjusted from 3120 based on ATR 16.9981 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 100% (indicating further crowding).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破125（基于ATR和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score超过80%（显示过度拥挤多头），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 125 (based on ATR and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score exceeds 80% (indicating overly crowded longs).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破880（基于ATR 3.5498和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score转为正值超过50%（显示空头平仓完成），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 880 (based on ATR 3.5498 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score turns positive exceeding 50% (indicating short covering completed).
